name: Glass Kit - up&up™: Moving Supplies, Glass Packing Kit, Mailing Boxes, Chipboard, Flap Closure, Brown, 12" Width
description:
Upgrade your kitchen packing and storage with this Glass Kit from up&up™. This easy-to-assemble packing kit features chipboard box with flap closures, chipboard dividers and packing foam. Perfect for moving or long-term storage, the box holds 12 glasses or stemware.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
